feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Where to start as a total newcomer to SAP.
entry.content:
Hello everyone, first of all sorry if I'm posting this somewhere I shouldn't but I really need some guidance here.

Before creating missunderstandings I have to point out I've been through some rough years mentally and I'm just starting to be able to fight with it so I still struggle a bit with being consistent by myself.

That said, I've had a chat with a irl friend working on lindedln, basically told me that S4 Hana HCM is one of the most requested profiles that most enterprises look for, and there's almost no people that studied that so there's even less people that can teach from scratch.

I've been struggling because I can't seem to find a course (free or not idc) that actually teaches me how to work as a HCM SAP consultant, so I've seen tons of youtube videos, tutorials on how to manage positions, workers, pays, days off, role switches, etc etc. But I can't seem to find an official course that can teach me from 0 to "hired" to say it easily, I've seen even other ERP's, I'm a IT technician so I have kind of a base and slightly worked with Databases before, still, Idk whats my entry point, what points to follow and what to exactly study to become a SAP HCM consultant.

I mentioned my mental situtation first because i know there can be people that just decided to smack some youtube tutorials and had the will to learn by themselves in 2 months, but I've been struggling to even find a way to practice, and even worse, a way to prove that I'm capable in that ambit.

Long story short, could anyone please guide me on what to do, what to study, how to test myself and how to eventually make a living out of it? Needed prerequisites/courses/webpages/tutorials/specific things, everything is going to be well received by me!
Thank you truly,
Axel.

entry.title: HR error R11263 : You may not enter any number in the dialog for ID type HCM001
entry.content:
Hi expert:

while i create business partner-person for employee. I got error as "R11263 : You may not enter any number in the dialog for ID type HCM001 "

entry.title: Add district to the payment slip
entry.content:
Previously, we used the "City" field in IT0006 to input district data. After upgrading from ECC to S4 HANA, we have realized that the HK address does not require the "City" field, and we would like to change this to utilize the "District" field instead.

However, we have encountered an issue: when generating the payment slip, the district data does not appear. The current configuration only displays the street, 2nd address line, city, and area. 

Could you please advise on how we can resolve this issue?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Count absences from last year to the current payroll run
entry.content:
I have a complex issue related to absences, i have absence type 0003 and i should count the number of days from this absences from last year to the current payroll,

example : if i run 01.07.2024 to 31.07.2024 , system should count the number of absence days from 01.08.2023 to 31.07.2024

and the next month august 2024 , system should count the days from 01.09.2023 to 31.08.2024 and so on.....

Note: i use negative time 

any support?

entry.title: Logon with language key english_GB
entry.content:
Hi,

how can I logon to sap via sapgui and logon language 6n (english_GB)? 6n is installed, but is not offered in sapgui.

Thank you a lot,

Elena

entry.title: SAP HCM S/4Hana Examination Inquiry
entry.content:
I am trying to access C_THR12_2311 examination for certificate. It's asking me to subscribe for the yearly plan of USD 1,332. 

Is there any cheaper alternative than subscribing for the yearly plan? Thank you.

P.S: I've found two exam chances for $250~ but not available for individuals.

entry.title: Error when trying to push content on OCN
entry.content:
Hello the community,

We have some issues when pushing content to SAP - OData AP using this endpoint POST /learning/odatav4/public/admin/ocn/v1/OcnCourses.

We are receiving this error:

{ "error": { "code": null, "message": "Error adding OCN course - xxxxxxx" } }

  • Where/how can we find more details about the require that we made?

  • Why the request does not show up in API Center - OData API Audit Log?

Thanks,

entry.title: How to calculate difference between two dates in sap time schema
entry.content:
Hi All,

Could you please help me with the below issue?

Vacation accrual amounts are calculated based on the vacation eligibility date indicated in IT0041. However, these amounts are generated every anniversary based on the employee's start date rather than the vacation eligibility date.

For example, if an employee's start date is June 16, 2019, and their vacation eligibility date is November 26, 2003, the expected result is that the vacation quota should be generated on the anniversary of November 26, 2020.

Currently, the system uses a time type to accumulate  days from the start date. In the above example, the system accumulates time from June 16, 2019, resulting in 365 days by June 16, 2020. At that point, the quota is generated, and the time type is reset to 1 to begin counting for the next year.

However, in this scenario, the time type should start accumulating from November 26, 2019. Could you please suggest how to achieve this in the Personnel Calculation Rules (PCR)?

 

Thank you so much for your help in advance!

entry.title: HCM Payroll PCR Attendance Bonus
entry.content:
The client wants to pay an attendance bonus based on the following conditions:

If an employee is present for the entire month – ₹1500.
If an employee takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹1000.
If an employee takes two days of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month – ₹1500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month and takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹1000.
If an employee joins on the second day of the month and takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month and takes more than one day of leave – ₹0.
I have tried handling this through a PCR, but it is not considering employees who joined on the second day of the month.

How can I resolve this issue? Please suggest a solution

entry.title: Deactivation of data sync betwenn SU01 and HR Master Data (PA30) for specific field
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,

We'd like to deactivate the sync of the title value in the adress data of SU01 and title value of HR Master Data (PA30).

Currently if we set the title value in HR Master Data of a user to for example Mr. or Miss the value of the title field in the address section of SU01 gets changed as well.
Usually a very useful function but for several reasons not for us.

So is there a way to prevent that the title value in the address data in SU01 of a user gets updated?

Best regards,
Joyce

entry.title: HCM rule
entry.content:
Hello, I am trying to create new professional groups, but when validating this rule I cannot find the meaning of:
                  NUM=D GRPR

I don't know what table D is or if is another value.

Thanks,

entry.title: PU19 Error in Generating PDF
entry.content:
Hello, 

what could be the possible cause of these errors? I already checked the ADS and it its working fine, the forms are also maintained in V_T5UX7

Note: It is working in Prod system but not working in Lower Environments

entry.title: Bonus Calculation Explanation - Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I need some explanation on bonus calculation. For our customer we use additive formula (base + individual). We also use guidelines for PM Rating that the employee are not eligible for bonus, if their pm rating is <3. We do not use business or team goals.

As you can see below, we notice that the final pay out field takes the same amount as the total target amount. The final pay out amount is coming from the base. We try to understand how the base is calculated. Can anyone please clarify the differences of these fields and how the base is calculated and where for the bonus calculation.

 

Last, our customer requires a custom calculation for the bonus and it is different from the system's.

Bonus Calculation Screenshot:

Your advice would be helpful.

Kind Regards,

Olga

entry.title: SAP HCM on premise ABAP
entry.content: I had started my career as HCM Abaper , i want to know what will be the better SAP Certification available for my role irrespective of CABAP_D and is there any link i can get expose to HCM S4 Hana on premise ABAP or H4S4 on premise ABAP learning modules.

entry.title: CREAR SUBCARACTERISTICA EN PE03
entry.content:
Hola:

Estoy tratando de crear un nuevo nodo para la caracteristica LGMST como tipo Subcaracteristica.

Al tratar de activar la subcaracteristica, el sistema me muestra el siguiente mensaje: " No se permite asignacion a subcaracteristica"

¿Alguien sabe como se ha de crear este tipo de nodo? La tengo definida como subcaracteristica en el aparatado de atributos, pero no se que ocurre. 

Gracias,

Miguel

entry.title: BP Sync issue with systemID
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have issue with BP sync with System ID .

We have PERNR updated with IT105 ,ST0001 with SystemID.

We ran BP sync #/SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE replication program, sync report is successful but when we check in SU01 for that user it is showing as Classic address but not business partner assignment.

Already verified SAP Note #3234879,  3228710 but we don't have BCS*  entries hence it is not relevant.

Please advise.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Will there still be an SAP HCM in ECC/S/4HANA certification next release?
entry.content: I wanted to plan my exam and saw that it's getting retired

entry.title: Return blank value using IF () in story report
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to populate a field value as below in story reports:

If Field Value matches to particular value, then Return "Last Modified Date Time" else Return Blank.

I tried to achieve it using IF () Function, but system is expecting second parameter of IF () Function also as Date Time type value, not blank. 

Any assistance would be really helpful.

entry.title: Can't find our code for GB Security Training in the Dynamic Business Event Menu.
Having Issue in changing status of employees from Loan interest bearing to int. Free
entry.content:
I have a PF Fund Loan (ZL10) in SAP HCM and need guidance on handling the following scenarios:

  1. An employee with an interest-bearing loan wants to switch to an interest-free loan.

    • What steps should I follow to successfully run payroll for the upcoming month with an updated payslip?
    • Do I need to process a special repayment first and then issue a new loan for the remaining amount without interest?

  2. An employee with an interest-free loan wants to switch to an interest-bearing loan.

    • If I process a special repayment in the last payroll run (e.g., 01.02.2025) and then create a new loan with interest effective 01.03.2025, SAP displays errors such as:
      • "Please maintain an interest rate for employee XXX."
      • "Please do not maintain an interest rate for employee XXX."
    • How can I resolve these errors and ensure a smooth payroll run? i am unable to run payroll ...

      need urgent help

      -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    •  

    •  

    •
